name_cn:
Genuine quality
New arrival 🅰️🅰️
Celine 23 Early Spring Lisa same style mini ~besace
The real thing is really beautiful, retro and stylish, looks good with any outfit! The design features a curved bottom and flap, making it look younger. Compared to the mini style, it has a 10-handle design, playful and cute. You'll fall in love at first sight. It's incredibly elegant for photos. Can be worn crossbody or on the shoulder, or carried by hand!
Style: Retro, stylish, cute style~
Capacity: Doesn't fit a large phone, can hold keys, tissues, compact powder, 💄
Model No.: 10L063 Sakura Pink
Dimensions: 15.5-11.5-5 (with original packaging)
